sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8960" key="a)nqupostrofh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθυπο-στροφή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n8960.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">return,</tr_> of a clyster, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0748.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sever.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Clyst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
